results.generatedSDL:
"Base interface for entities with a unique identifier"
interface Node {
  "Unique identifier"
  id: ID!
}

"Interface for entities with timestamp fields"
interface Timestamped {
  "Creation timestamp"
  createdAt: DateTime!
  "Last update timestamp"
  updatedAt: DateTime
}

"Interface for entities that can be searched"
interface Searchable {
  "Search relevance ranking"
  searchRank: Float
}

"User type implementing Node and Timestamped interfaces"
type User implements Node & Timestamped {
  id: ID!
  createdAt: DateTime!
  updatedAt: DateTime
  "Unique username"
  username: String!
  "User email address"
  email: Email!
  "User profile information"
  profile: UserProfile
}

"Product type implementing multiple interfaces"
type Product implements Node & Timestamped & Searchable {
  id: ID!
  createdAt: DateTime!
  updatedAt: DateTime
  searchRank: Float
  "Product name"
  name: String!
  "Product description"
  description: String
  "Product price"
  price: Float!
  "Product category"
  category: Category
}

"Category type implementing only Node interface"
type Category implements Node {
  id: ID!
  "Category name"
  name: String!
  "URL-friendly category identifier"
  slug: String!
  "Parent category for nested hierarchies"
  parent: Category
}

"User profile data (does not implement any interfaces)"
type UserProfile {
  "User biography"
  bio: String
  "URL to user's avatar image"
  avatarUrl: URI
  "User's location"
  location: String
  "User's personal website"
  website: URI
}

"Interface that extends another interface"
interface ExtendedInterface implements Node {
  id: ID!
  "Additional field for extended interface"
  extendedField: String
}

"Concrete type implementing an extended interface"
type ConcreteExtended implements ExtendedInterface {
  id: ID!
  extendedField: String
  "Field specific to concrete implementation"
  concreteField: String
}

# Implied Scalars
scalar Email
scalar URI

results.generatedSDL:
"Union type representing possible search results"
union SearchResult = User | Product | Article

"A user entity"
type User {
  id: ID!
  username: String!
  email: Email!
}

"A product entity"
type Product {
  id: ID!
  name: String!
  price: Float!
}

"An article entity"
type Article {
  id: ID!
  title: String!
  content: String!
  author: User
}

"Union type for different media types"
union MediaItem = Image | Video | Audio

"An image file"
type Image {
  id: ID!
  url: URI!
  width: Int!
  height: Int!
  altText: String
}

"A video file"
type Video {
  id: ID!
  url: URI!
  "Duration in seconds"
  duration: Int!
  thumbnail: URI
}

"An audio file"
type Audio {
  id: ID!
  url: URI!
  "Duration in seconds"
  duration: Int!
  "Audio bitrate in kbps"
  bitrate: Int
}

"Target for a notification - can be a user or team"
union NotificationTarget = User | Team

"A team entity"
type Team {
  id: ID!
  name: String!
  members: [User!]
}

"Different payment method types"
union PaymentMethod = CreditCard | BankAccount | DigitalWallet

"Credit card payment method"
type CreditCard {
  id: ID!
  lastFour: String!
  brand: String!
  expiryMonth: Int!
  expiryYear: Int!
}

"Bank account payment method"
type BankAccount {
  id: ID!
  accountNumberLastFour: String!
  routingNumber: String!
  accountType: String
}

"Digital wallet payment method"
type DigitalWallet {
  id: ID!
  provider: String!
  email: Email
}

"""A comprehensive test schema covering all JSON Schema features for round-trip validation"""
type Complextestschema @auth {
  "Unique identifier"
  id: ID!
  "Name field with length constraints"
  name: String!
  "Email address"
  email: Email!
  "Age in years"
  age: Int
  "Score value"
  score: Float
  "Active status flag"
  isActive: Boolean
  "Array of tags"
  tags: [String]
  "User roles"
  roles: [String]
  "Additional metadata"
  metadata: Metadata
  "Current status"
  status: String
  address: Address
  phoneNumbers: [Phonenumbers]
  preferences: Preferences
  "Field that can be null"
  nullableField: JSON
  "Array with mixed types"
  mixedArray: [JSON]
  dateFields: Datefields
  complexNested: Complexnested
  conditionalField: Conditionalfield
  "Field that accepts either email or URI"
  anyOfExample: JSON
  "Combined schema using allOf"
  allOfExample: JSON
}

"Complete user service schema demonstrating all x-graphql-* extensions"
type User @key(fields: "\"id\"") @extends {
  "Unique user identifier"
  id: ID! @external
  "Unique username for login"
  username: String!
  "User's email address"
  email: Email!
  "User's first name"
  firstName: String
  "User's last name"
  lastName: String
  "User's full name (computed)"
  fullName: String @requires(fields: "\"firstName lastName\"")
  "User's date of birth"
  dateOfBirth: Date
  "Account creation timestamp"
  createdAt: DateTime!
  "Last update timestamp"
  updatedAt: DateTime!
  "Whether the user account is active"
  isActive: Boolean!
  "Whether the user's email is verified"
  isVerified: Boolean!
  "User's role in the system"
  role: UserRole!
  "User's age in years"
  age: Int
  "Number of profile views"
  profileViews: Int!
  "User's average rating"
  rating: Float
  "URL to user's avatar image"
  avatarUrl: URL
  "User tags for categorization"
  tags: [String!]!
  "List of user's friends"
  friends(limit: Int = 10, offset: Int = 0): [User!]
  "User's posts"
  posts(limit: Int = 20, filter: PostFilter): [Post!]!
  "User preferences and settings"
  settings: UserSettings
  "Additional user metadata"
  metadata: JSONObject
}
